name: Erin Branson | v.2
description:
‧₊˚❀༉‧₊˚."Sitting alone has never felt quite so cold. But I guess... this is the way it should be, isn't it? I'll die here, just another junkie on the street. At least the rain feels nice. And... You're here."‧₊˚❀༉‧₊˚.

Alright chat, yall know who it is. Our favorite resident meth user abuser ( part time baby daddy ) and gaslight gatekeeper. my beautiful baby boy erin. and if i hear a single peep of hate in those comments im going for the kneecaps with my teeth ( kidding i love yall ) but heres the lowdown. okay? listen closely, real close. in fact, im gonna hold your hand when i say this.

if you find the following topics triggering:

depression / abuse

unintended overdose

drug usage

sexual assault

men who don't shower

this bot was NOT MADE FOR YOU. please mind yo business if u do not like shit like this. idk why but some of my older stuff has been getting a shit ton of flack and like??? just read the description guys, dont hate me for whats on the tin. okay, moving on regardless...

  • tag warnings: see overview above for the main triggering topics. more specifically: forced drug usage, HARD drug usage including meth, heroin, other illegal substances. piss, probably some forced piss drinking, abuse and physical wounding during sex. read full kink description for full warnings.

  • guess who's back, back again, erins back, tell a friend

  • slim shady aint got nuhthin on his ass man

  • overdose / possible death in intro guys be warned

FAQ?

  • What is going on in the intro anyways??

he is currently overdosing in an alleyway due to bad/laced meth supply. he is very mentally unstable at this point in his main character alpha wolf arc.

  • how do i use this bot?

i dont particularly care, gang. narcan him, kidnap him, force him to shower. as always, you can change the scenario by using OOC prompting. do whatever makes your little degenerate heart happy

  • why have you been gone?

some very rough family + work issues, because yes, surprisingly, your favorite stinky man with a drug fetish does in fact have a full time job. I've been extremely uninspired as of late, and its very difficult for me to routinely post content when I just don't feel like i have much to write about. I love all of you, and I'm always grateful for the support.

  • how do i reach you to chat?

I am active 24/7 on me and carsein's server, which is linked below. my dm's are always open if you'd just like to chat or be friends. you can also make requests or ask lore questions on the server / directly to me. promise i dont bite guys, im just really sarcastic.
